title: rosa canina var. beatricis
intro: Rosa canina var. beatricis is a specific variety of the Rosa canina plant, commonly known as dog rose or wild rose. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its high content of vitamin C, flavonoids, and anthocyanins, which contribute to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. beatricis include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and supporting digestive health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Rosa canina var. beatricis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
